_meta.description: BT (breakthrough) promotion gate spec — CONSN-P7-1 (A17_CONSENSUS P7). Formalizes the gate where consensus_candidate lines in shared/discovery_log.jsonl qualify for BT tree registration (shared/bt/).

purpose.summary: Decide whether a consensus_candidate is eligible for promotion into the BT tree (shared/bt/ SSOT). Single authoritative gate layer between discovery_log and bt registration.
purpose.why: Roadmap NEXUS / A17_CONSENSUS / P7 task CONSN-P7-1. Until now consensus candidates accumulated in discovery_log with no formal promotion pathway — promotion criteria were implicit / ad-hoc (see shared/discovery/atlas_l7bt_promotion_2026-04-14.json one-shot audit). This spec normalizes the criteria.
non_goals: mirror of bt_audit.hexa doc-based MATCH/MISMATCH pipeline (independent layer)

bt_domains.usage: domain ∈ bt_domains[].domain — membership enables cross-domain credit

bt_audit_result.usage: optional — cross-check against existing BT EXACT audit for novelty_check

min_score.desc: seed_quality (n6-const proximity) lower bound — score = 1 - min_rel_dist to [6,12,2,4,5,24,7,28,120,720]

min_cross_confirms.desc: Number of distinct (pipeline_idx) paths independently producing the same (domain, name) tuple. Independence proxy: 1 candidate per pipeline — cross = count of distinct pipeline_idx for the tuple.
min_cross_confirms.derivation: group by (domain, name) on discovery_log.jsonl, count distinct pipeline_idx

independence_test.desc: Second-level independence — cross-confirms must differ in pipeline_seed (stronger) or pipeline_path head module (weaker) or any (null test). Default distinct_pipeline_seed.

n6_match_min.desc: Minimum n6 proximity tier. Tiering: EXACT=score>=0.95, STRONG=0.80<=score<0.95, WEAK=0.60<=score<0.80, NONE=<0.60.

novelty_check.desc: true ⇒ (domain, name) must NOT already appear as a 100% MATCH entry in bt_audit_result.json (prevents duplicate promotion of already-established BT).

denial_reasons.desc: novelty_check false — already in bt_audit_result 100% MATCH
cross-confirms share pipeline_seed / path head per independence_test

audit_log.rule: bt_keywords.jsonl / bt_domains.jsonl 직접 쓰기 금지 — audit_log 경유만

modes.check: 단일 candidate_id 평가 — hexa run bt_promotion_gate.hexa check <candidate_id>
modes.scan: discovery_log 전체 스캔, 각 (domain,name) 튜플 1회 평가 (dedup by tuple) + audit_log append
modes.dry-scan: scan 과 동일하나 audit_log append 없음 (stdout summary only)

candidate_id_derivation.rationale: tuple-stable across re-runs — min_pipeline_idx tiebreaker makes id deterministic for the *first-seen* context.

invariants.bt_writeback: 금지 — bt_keywords.jsonl / bt_domains.jsonl / bt_audit_result.json 쓰기 X
invariants.atlas_writeback: 금지 — atlas.n6 직접 쓰기 X (sidecar/audit_log only)
invariants.bak_files: 금지 — git history 가 유일 버전관리

smoke_steps: 1. hexa run shared/harness/bt_promotion_gate.hexa dry-scan — stdout summary 확인
2. hexa run shared/harness/bt_promotion_gate.hexa scan — audit_log 최초 생성
4. hexa run shared/harness/bt_promotion_gate.hexa status 5 — 최근 5 이벤트 dump

future_work.CONSN-P7-2: consensus gate + BT 승격 정합성 검증 주기 — 이 spec 의 threshold 조정 루프

CONSN-P8-1.task: consensus gate + BT 승격 정합성 검증 주기

verification_passes.P1_evidence: discovery_log.jsonl 에서 promoted candidate 의 source evidence 존재 확인
verification_passes.P2_score_reverify: seed_quality 재계산 + tier 재평가, 기록 값과 비교
verification_passes.P3_bt_state: bt_domains.jsonl 도메인 멤버십 + bt_labels.json 중복 + cross_confirms 임계치

CONSN-P8-1.drift_detection: promoted candidates 중 source evidence 소실 비율 (threshold 20%)
